metadata.source: K Street Character Descriptor Intake Tool

consent.permission_notes: Example record only. Do not treat as a real submission.

identity.current_location_or_usual_setting: Usually near the planning board, coffee in hand.

character_core.one_sentence_summary: A calm strategist who can turn scattered people into a working plan.

appearance.visual_descriptors: Relaxed posture, alert eyes, practical haircut, memorable glasses.
appearance.clothing_style_props: Layered jacket, tidy sneakers, notebook, reliable pen.
appearance.default_expression: Listening carefully with one eyebrow slightly raised.
appearance.movement_body_language: Still when thinking, precise hand motions when explaining.
appearance.source_image_notes: Keep references private unless separately approved.

voice_and_behavior.voice_speech_rhythm: Measured, concise, with a soft punchline after the serious point.
voice_and_behavior.behavior_under_pressure: Gets quieter, prioritizes essentials, delegates cleanly.
voice_and_behavior.how_they_help_friends_allies: Finds the missing piece and gives people jobs they can actually do.

boundaries: Avoid jokes about private family details

mechanics_hooks: turn confusion into a bonus action
spot weak points in a plan
narrative_design.growth_arc: Learns to let other people carry weight instead of quietly carrying all of it.

generated.character_summary: The Compass is a grounded, dryly funny planner whose calm presence turns confusion into action.
